description: A line operator is running low on a specific component and needs to request more from the central warehouse.

nodes.task_description: Identify the part number and the required quantity for the material request.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the component and the standard replenishment quantity.

nodes.task_description: Check the availability of the component in the main warehouse.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that the warehouse has sufficient stock.

nodes.task_description: Submit a material requisition request to the warehouse.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully submits the request, and a pick ticket is generated for the warehouse team.
